# Contributing Guidelines

These are the shared contribution standards for repositories under nitsuah and
Nitsuah-Labs.

## Workflow

- Create a feature branch using one of: feat/, fix/, chore/, docs/, refactor/
- Keep pull requests focused and reviewable
- Link issues and tasks when applicable
- Update docs affected by your change

## Commit Messages

Use Conventional Commits when possible:
- feat: new behavior
- fix: bug fix
- docs: documentation only
- chore: maintenance

## Pull Request Expectations

- Describe what changed and why
- Include testing evidence
- Call out follow-up work explicitly

## Repo-Specific Sources of Truth

- For execution tasks, use TASKS.md in each repository
- For planning and quarter scope, use ROADMAP.md in each repository
- For security disclosures, follow SECURITY.md in this .github repo
